productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Black Taupe Lifestyle Casual Shoe
description: CompositionGrey shoes made with leather/synthetic uppers, phylon midsoles, carbon rubber outsoles and comes with an additonal pair of lacesshoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washEnhance your style quotient in these grey sneakers from skechers. The retro vulcanised look is upgraded with a leather and synthetic upper ensuring ample ventilation for the feet. The multiple overlays and stitch detailing ensure greater protection and stability. The padded collar and tongue coupled with a cushioned insole gives a firm but soft grip, while the lightweight, shock absorbing phylon midsole adds to the comfort factor and protects the feet from injuries. The rubber outsole has a pitted design to improve grip and stability.
